title: Steam n' spells
description: A modpack that combines technology and magic
body:
A modpack where magic and technology collide to bring you the perfect blend of magic and technology, from making incredible machines to fighting with powerful spells and summoning allies u can do anything your heart diseres

(twilight forest and Project pixel mods can't be added due to modrinth moderation)

!!!THIS MODPACK FETURES MODS LIKE!!!
- Iron's spells and spellbooks + Alshanex's Familiars
Use spells and summon allies to aid you in battle and with the Alshanex's Familiars mod you      can also summon a fellow mage to battle along side you!
  
- Create mod
Build incredible machines and contraptions where your only limit is your imagination and resources
  
- Bosses'Rise
Fight incredibly well made bossfights and obtain their loot to make yourself stronger

- Oritech
From quarries, to quantum physics, to even black holes this mod has everything a engineer desires and it also has some sick animations
  
 - way too many structures :p
If you like exploring then you are in luck since in this modpack we have more than 80+ structures so you will always find something in your adventures!

!!! RECOMMENDED 8 GB OF RAM !!!
